runTitle: Vercel production targeted QA - fullscreen analysis basis parity after v8.11.12 deploy
coveredSurfaces: production landing version badge on v8.11.12
system-boot to dashboard transition on production
dashboard warning CTA opens AI sidebar with prefilled prompt
AI sidebar first response renders analysis basis detail with traceId/tool/timeRange
fullscreen AI workspace restores the same conversation on production
fullscreen analysis basis detail preserves traceId/tool/timeRange parity on production

expertAssessments.rationale: Production deployment on v8.11.12 preserved traceId, engine label, tool result, and recent 1 hour time range across sidebar to fullscreen handoff.
Post-deploy user flow validated the exact regression path on production using Playwright from landing through dashboard AI sidebar to fullscreen workspace.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period reviewed after v8.11.12 production deployment; effective 9.1391 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, no unexpected billed usage spike.

artifacts.label: Production fullscreen AI workspace with preserved analysis basis detail

notes: Production landed on v8.11.12 before the targeted verification started.
Sidebar analysis basis detail showed traceId 8cfd6ce31a0ab6313015bad7f0529cbf, tool 이상 탐지, and period 최근 1시간.
Fullscreen workspace restored the same message and preserved the same traceId, tool summary, engine label Streaming AI + RAG, and 최근 1시간 period on production.
The prior regression where fullscreen collapsed to 일반 대화 응답 was not reproduced after the v8.11.12 production deploy.
